payload.decision: Used conditional property assignment in _buildOptions instead of || undefined to prevent undefined values from overriding core defaults via spread
payload.rationale: The core merges options with { ...DEFAULTS, ...options } — explicit undefined keys override defaults, causing NaN in margin calculations
alternatives_rejected: Using val || undefined (which produces explicit undefined that overrides spread defaults)

payload.text: npm no longer supports Classic Automation tokens. For CI/CD publishing with 2FA-enabled accounts, must use granular access tokens with publish permissions and 'bypass 2fa' enabled.
payload.author: human
